GM=Games played
KI=Kicks
MK=Marks

DI=Disposals

FA=Free kicks against
BR=Brownlow votes
CP=Contested possessions
UP=Uncontested possessions

MI=Marks inside 50
1%=One percenters
BO=Bounces
GA=Goal assist
%P=Percentage of game played
SU=Sub (On/Off)
↑=subbed on
